(2) They shall come into force on the date of their publicqtion, in the Official Gazette. - 1. In the Agricultural and Processed Food Products Export Development Authority Rules, 1986, for rules 6 and 7 the following rules shall be substituted, namely :- "6. Powers and duties of the Chairman- The Chairman shall, (a) be the overall Head of the Authority;. (b) preside over the meetings of the Authority. -7. Powers and duties of the Setretary- The Secretary shall, (a) sanction expenditure for contingencies, supplies and sewices and purchase of articles required for the working of the office of the Authority; (b) be responsible for implementation of the Plan Schemes of the Authority; (c) exercise such administrative and financial powers as may be necessary for the smoothfunctioning of the Authority; (d) issue receipts on behalf of the Authonty for all moneys received under the Act; (e) maintain a proper record of the proceedings of the meetings of the Authority and decisions of those meetings; (9 be responsible for preparation of draft Annual report on the working of the Authority and its submission to Central Government after approval by the Authority on a date not later than the date specifibd in this behalf by the Central Government; (g) maintain a proper record of the register of exporters in accordance with the provisions of Chapter Ill of the Act; (h) attend all the meetings of the Authority and assist Chairman in implementing the decisions of the Authonty; -- 3 of 4 -- 4 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDMARY [PART11-SEC. 3(ii)] j (i) the Secretary may, for the purpose of carrying out the functions I iI of the Authority, assign duties to the officers and employees of i the Authority. [F. NO.1/1/2008-EP(Agri-IV)] ANURAG SAXENA, Jt. Secy. Note : The principal rules were published in the Official Gazette vide S.0.652(E) dated the 3Fdday of September, 1986 and the amendment rules were published by the following notifications, namely:- 1. S.O. 806(E), dated the 1l t h day of September, 1998 2. S.O. 238(E), dated the 22nd day of February, 2005 3. S.O. 961(E), dated the 12th day of June, 2007 4.
